nodes.name: JniDbzSourceRegistry.java
nodes.summary: Registry for managing Debezium CDC source instances via JNI, allowing Rust code to create and control Java-based CDC engines.

nodes.name: JniSourceValidateHandler.java
nodes.summary: JNI handler that validates source connector configurations, bridging Rust validation requests to Java-based database validators.

nodes.name: log4j2.properties
nodes.summary: Log4j2 logging configuration for connector service tests, defining log levels and appender settings.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the JDBC runner module enabling RisingWave JDBC-based sink connectors.

nodes.name: test-private-key.pem
nodes.summary: Test RSA private key PEM file used in JDBC runner tests for Snowflake private key authentication scenarios.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the Cassandra sink connector module, specifying the DataStax Java driver dependency.

nodes.name: CassandraUtil.java
nodes.summary: Utility class providing CQL type mapping and data conversion between RisingWave column types and Apache Cassandra data types.

nodes.name: CassandraUtil
nodes.summary: Static utility class for CQL type mapping and Cassandra data conversion for the RisingWave Cassandra sink.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the Elasticsearch 7 / OpenSearch sink module, specifying ES7 and OpenSearch client dependencies.

nodes.name: BulkListener.java
nodes.summary: Elasticsearch bulk request lifecycle listener that handles success, failure, and retry callbacks for the RisingWave ES sink.

nodes.name: BulkProcessorAdapter.java
nodes.summary: Adapter interface abstracting the bulk processor for both Elasticsearch 7 and OpenSearch clients.

nodes.name: ElasticBulkProcessorAdapter.java
nodes.summary: Elasticsearch 7 implementation of the bulk processor adapter, wrapping the ES7 client for batched index operations.

nodes.name: OpensearchBulkProcessorAdapter.java
nodes.summary: OpenSearch implementation of the bulk processor adapter, enabling the RisingWave ES sink to work with OpenSearch clusters.

nodes.name: OpensearchRestHighLevelClientAdapter.java
nodes.summary: Adapter wrapping the OpenSearch high-level REST client to fit the Elasticsearch-compatible API used by the RisingWave sink.

nodes.name: log4j2.properties
nodes.summary: Log4j2 configuration for Elasticsearch sink module tests.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the Iceberg sink module specifying Iceberg, AWS S3, Hive, and Glue catalog dependencies.

nodes.name: GlueCredentialProvider.java
nodes.summary: AWS Glue credential provider for the Iceberg catalog, handling assume-role authentication for RisingWave's Glue catalog integration.

nodes.name: JniCatalogWrapper.java
nodes.summary: JNI wrapper exposing Iceberg catalog operations (load/rename tables, list namespaces) to Rust code for the RisingWave Iceberg sink.

nodes.name: JniCatalogWrapper
nodes.summary: JNI bridge class that exposes Iceberg catalog operations to the Rust layer for use in the RisingWave Iceberg connector.

nodes.name: RESTObjectMapper.java
nodes.summary: Jackson ObjectMapper configuration for serializing and deserializing Iceberg REST catalog request/response objects.

nodes.name: S3FileIOAssumeRoleAwsClientFactory.java
nodes.summary: AWS client factory for Iceberg S3 FileIO using assume-role credentials, enabling cross-account S3 access for the RisingWave Iceberg sink.

nodes.name: DynClasses.java
nodes.summary: Iceberg dynamic class loading utility copied from Apache Iceberg, enabling reflective class lookup with fallback strategies.

nodes.name: DynConstructors.java
nodes.summary: Dynamic constructor invocation utility from Apache Iceberg, providing reflective constructor lookup and invocation with multiple fallback strategies.

nodes.name: DynFields.java
nodes.summary: Dynamic field access utility from Apache Iceberg, enabling reflective field reads and writes on Java objects with type-safe wrappers.

nodes.name: DynMethods.java
nodes.summary: Dynamic method invocation utility from Apache Iceberg, providing reflective method lookup and invocation with static, instance, and unbound method variants.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief note explaining that these dynamic utility classes are copied from the Apache Iceberg project.

nodes.name: GlueCredentialProviderTest.java
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the GlueCredentialProvider, verifying assume-role credential construction and configuration parsing.
